commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=58a62bba14e379f1a31dff942e185c9008a8aa96)
commands.review_summary:
PR updates Antigravity process detection so `antigravity-cli` and `antigravity_cli` are treated like the existing language-server command names.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main requires a `language_server` executable-name match before accepting an Antigravity process, so an `antigravity-cli` command line would be skipped. I did not run a live provider probe because repository policy warns against live provider checks unless explicitly requested.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor should add real behavior proof before merge; automation should not be requested because it cannot prove the contributor's Antigravity setup.

target.title: Fix Antigravity CLI detection
target.body:
### Summary
Since the main entry point for Antigravity is now `antigravity-cli` (rather than the IDE `language_server` process), usage tracking failed to probe local status endpoints. This updates `isLanguageServerCommandLine` and `isAntigravityCommandLine` to correctly match the new `antigravity-cli` process name so local probing and usage tracking can succeed.

### Commands Run
- `make check`: SwiftFormat passed (0 files require formatting).
- `swift test`: Passed locally.

*(No UI changes)*
target.author: oyaah

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
